name: lessons-learned-capture
summary: On any tool failure, append the failure signature to .claude/rules/lessons-learned.md for later review. Uses flock for atomic append.
when_to_use: Any project where you want a self-healing feedback loop from tool errors.
script:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
I=$(head -c 65536)
jq -e . >/dev/null 2>&1 <<<"$I" || { echo '{"decision":"approve"}'; exit 0; }
TOOL=$(jq -r '.tool_name // ""' <<<"$I")
ERR=$(jq -r '.error // ""' <<<"$I")
[ -z "$ERR" ] || [ "$ERR" = null ] && { echo '{"decision":"approve"}'; exit 0; }
ST=$(printf '%s' "$TOOL" | head -c 50 | tr -d '`$()\\!"'"'")
SE=$(printf '%s' "$ERR" | head -c 200 | tr -d '`$()\\!"'"'")
T=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
mkdir -p .claude/rules
(flock -x 200; printf '\n### %s failure (%s)\n- Tool: %s\n- Error: %s\n- Status: NEEDS_FIX\n' "$ST" "$T" "$ST" "$SE" >> .claude/rules/lessons-learned.md) 200>/tmp/cc-lessons.lock
echo '{"decision":"approve"}'
verify: Force a tool error; confirm a new entry appears in .claude/rules/lessons-learned.md.
